query:
INSERT INTO public.questions (
    id, question_text, question_type, options, correct_answer, explanation, hint,
    stimulus_text, stimulus_type, section, topic, difficulty, exam_type,
    is_platform_question, ai_generated, calculator_allowed, subject, subtopic,
    math_domain, pool_key, diagnostic_eligible, tags, external_id, source, source_metadata
  ) VALUES
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'In this passage, the author uses imagery to',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"make the passage more entertaining.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"help the reader visualize the experience.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"explain the author''s feelings and thoughts.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"create a sense of suspense and mystery.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'The author uses imagery to help the reader visualize the experience. The use of imagery creates a vivid picture in the reader''s mind, which can make the passage more engaging and memorable.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The author uses a complex structure in this passage to guide the reader through the author''s experience. The passage starts with a direct statement about the author''s experience, then the author uses imagery to help the reader visualize the experience, and then the author ends with a direct statement about the importance of the author''s experience. The use of imagery helps to make the passage more engaging and memorable. Which of the following techniques does the author use to make the passage more engaging and memorable?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Craft and Structure',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Craft and Structure',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Craft and Structure']::text[],
    'random_id_e8',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Craft and Structure","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'What is the most likely reason that the writer uses the phrase "almost paradoxical" to describe the young man′s condition?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"To emphasize the young man′s unique and unusual nature.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"To suggest that the young man is in a state of conflict.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"To illustrate that the young man is a complex and mysterious figure.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"To highlight the contrast between the young man′s personality and his behavior.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'The phrase "almost paradoxical" is used to emphasize the unusual nature of the young man′s condition. It''s surprising that he can be so energetic for work yet so exhausted at the same time. This paradoxical nature sets him apart from other people and makes him seem unique.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The young man was always tired. He was known for his late nights and his long days, which always started early. His friends would tease him and say, "You′re always out late, but you′re always at work before everyone else!" He would just shrug and say, "I can′t help it. It′s in my nature."  His friends would laugh, but they didn′t quite understand. They didn′t quite understand how one could be so energized for work and so exhausted at the same time. It wasn′t just about him being tired; it was about him being tired in a way that seemed almost paradoxical.',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Craft and Structure',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Craft and Structure',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Craft and Structure']::text[],
    'random_id_a1',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Craft and Structure","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice is the best example of the idea expressed in the passage that the development of the computer has been driven by a number of factors? ',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The abacus was a simple machine that was used for counting and calculations.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The development of the computer has had a profound impact on our world, revolutionizing the way we live, work, and communicate.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The development of the computer has been driven by a number of factors, including a desire to automate tasks, to improve the accuracy of calculations, and to create new and more powerful tools.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"It is interesting to note that the development of the computer has been driven by a number of factors, including a desire to automate tasks, to improve the accuracy of calculations, and to create new and more powerful tools.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'C',
    'Choice C is the best example of the idea expressed in the passage that the development of the computer has been driven by a number of factors.  This choice specifically lists the factors that have driven the development of the computer, including the desire to automate tasks, improve the accuracy of calculations, and create new and more powerful tools. The other choices are either too general or too specific.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The history of the development of the computer is a fascinating one. It began with simple machines, like the abacus, which was used for counting and calculations.  Over time, these machines were replaced by more complex machines, like the Jacquard loom, which used punched cards to control the weaving of intricate patterns.  Eventually, these machines were replaced by electronic computers, which were capable of performing much more complex calculations and tasks.  The development of the computer has had a profound impact on our world, revolutionizing the way we live, work, and communicate.  It is interesting to note that the development of the computer has been driven by a number of factors, including a desire to automate tasks, to improve the accuracy of calculations, and to create new and more powerful tools.   Which of the following statements is the best example of the idea expressed in the passage that the development of the computer has been driven by a number of factors?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Information and Ideas']::text[],
    '926a764b',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Information and Ideas","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice best revises the underlined portion of the sentence to maintain the formal style of the passage?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"They knew that the data wouldn’t be clear until years after the experiment began, but they were confident in the overall methodology.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"They knew that the data wouldn’t be clear until years after the experiment began, and they were confident in the overall methodology.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The scientist knew that the data would not be clear until years after the experiment began, and they were confident in the overall methodology.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"They knew that the data wouldn’t be clear until years after the experiment began, and they were confident in the overall methodology.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'The underlined portion of the sentence should maintain consistency with the tense of the rest of the passage.  Since the passage uses the past tense, the past tense form of "would not be" is the most appropriate choice.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The scientist knew that the study would be lengthy, and they were looking for a volunteer who would be able to commit to a long-term project.  They had a hunch that the data would not be clear until years after the experiment began, but they were confident in the overall methodology.',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Standard English Conventions']::text[],

  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'The author of the passage suggests that',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"scientists should abandon their current scientific approach to understanding the brain.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"a more holistic and meaningful understanding of the human brain can be achieved by focusing on understanding the \"big picture\" rather than on studying the parts of the brain in isolation.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"understanding the human brain is a simple process that can be achieved by studying the parts of the brain in isolation.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"scientists should only use traditional, philosophical methods to understand the brain.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'The author believes that focusing on understanding the "big picture" rather than just studying the parts of the brain in isolation will allow us to achieve a more holistic and meaningful understanding of the human brain.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The author suggests that, despite the popularity of a modern, scientific approach to understanding the human brain, scientists should not abandon traditional, philosophical methods.  The author argues that, because the human brain is so complex, it is more important to focus on understanding the "big picture" of what makes us human rather than merely studying the parts of the brain in isolation.  The author concludes by stating that this approach will allow us to "achieve a more holistic and meaningful understanding of the brain." Which choice most accurately summarizes the author’s main idea?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Information and Ideas']::text[],
    'random_id_e8',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Information and Ideas","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice is the most effective way to combine the sentences at the underlined portion so that they are grammatically correct and the meaning of the passage is maintained?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The invention of the printing press in the 15th century led to the mass production of books, enabling a wider audience to access information, which had an enormous impact on the dissemination of knowledge. ","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The invention of the printing press in the 15th century led to the mass production of books, which had an enormous impact on the dissemination of knowledge, and ","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The invention of the printing press in the 15th century led to the mass production of books, and this had an enormous impact on the dissemination of knowledge. ","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The invention of the printing press in the 15th century led to the mass production of books, and this had an enormous impact on the dissemination of knowledge, but","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'C',
    'Choice C is the best way to combine the sentences because it uses a comma and a coordinating conjunction to link the two independent clauses.  Choice A is incorrect because it uses a comma and a nonrestrictive clause, which is not the correct way to combine two independent clauses. Choice B is incorrect because it creates a comma splice: there is no conjunction to connect the two clauses.  Choice D is incorrect because it uses a comma and a coordinating conjunction to link the two independent clauses, but the conjunction "but" doesn’t logically connect the ideas in the sentences. It would make more sense to use the conjunction "however" to indicate a contrast between the ideas.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The invention of the printing press in the 15th century led to the mass production of books, which enabled a wider audience to access information. The printing press''s invention had an enormous impact on the dissemination of knowledge.  However, the printing press also had a negative effect on society, as it often led to the spread of misinformation and the suppression of dissenting voices.',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Standard English Conventions']::text[],
    '6f74b53f',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Standard English Conventions","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice most effectively combines the sentences at the underlined portion? ',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"But with the advent of movable type, books could be produced quickly and cheaply; making knowledge more widely available.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"But, with the advent of movable type, books could be produced quickly and cheaply, making knowledge more widely available.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"But with the advent of movable type, books could be produced quickly and cheaply, and making knowledge more widely available.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"But with the advent of movable type, books could be produced quickly and cheaply making knowledge more widely available.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'D',
    'The best way to combine these sentences is to use a comma after “cheaply” to separate the two independent clauses.  There is no need for a semicolon or a conjunction because the two sentences are not closely related in meaning or structure.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The invention of the printing press in the 15th century was a momentous event, forever changing the way people communicated and accessed information. Before the printing press, books were painstakingly copied by hand, making them rare and expensive. But with the advent of movable type, books could be produced quickly and cheaply, making knowledge more widely available. The impact of the printing press was profound, ushering in a new era of literacy and intellectual inquiry.',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Standard English Conventions']::text[],
    'random_id_c8',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Standard English Conventions","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'In this passage, the word "you" is used to',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"create a sense of intimacy and connection with the reader.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"describe the speaker’s feelings and experiences.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"emphasize the importance of the speaker’s message.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"suggest that the speaker is addressing a large audience.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'The speaker is addressing the reader directly by using the word "you." This creates a sense of intimacy and connection with the reader, which can help the reader feel more engaged with the message.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The most obvious sign that the speaker is speaking directly to the reader is the use of the word "you." There are other elements of the passage that may help to make the speaker seem more immediate and personal. The speaker refers to events and places that are familiar to the reader, and the speaker uses a conversational tone throughout the passage. What is the most likely reason why the writer uses the word "you"?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Information and Ideas']::text[],
    'f54c918d',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Information and Ideas","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'What is the main idea of this passage?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"Langston Hughes was a prolific writer who often explored themes of race, identity, and the African American experience.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The poem \"The Weary Blues\" is a blues poem that uses a unique combination of traditional blues music and literary techniques.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The poem \"The Weary Blues\" is a blues poem that portrays the weariness and resilience of African American life in the early 20th century.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"Langston Hughes’s poem \"The Weary Blues\" is a prime example of his work, which explores themes of race, identity, and the African American experience in the United States.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'D',
    'The passage focuses on Langston Hughes’s poem “The Weary Blues” as an example of his work. It describes the poem’s themes of race, identity, and the African American experience in the United States, and it highlights the unique combination of traditional blues music and literary techniques that Hughes used to create the poem.  The passage does not focus on Hughes as a writer in general, on the genre of blues poetry, or on the specific themes and techniques of the poem itself.  Therefore, the best answer is D.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The poet Langston Hughes, a central figure in the Harlem Renaissance, was a prolific writer, and his poems often explored themes of race, identity, and the African American experience in the United States. Hughes’s poem "The Weary Blues" is a prime example of his work. "The Weary Blues" is a blues poem that uses a unique combination of traditional blues music and literary techniques to portray the weariness and resilience of African American life in the early 20th century. Which of the following statements best describes the main idea of the passage?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Information and Ideas',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Information and Ideas']::text[],
    'random_id_c8',
    'college_board_opensat',
    '{"opensat_domain":"Information and Ideas","section":"english"}'::jsonb
  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'What is the most likely reason why the writer uses short sentences and simple words?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"To suggest that the speaker is in a hurry.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"To create a sense of realism and authenticity.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"To emphasize the speaker’s feelings of fear and anxiety.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"To provide a clear and concise explanation of the events.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'The author uses short sentences and simple words to create a sense of urgency and immediacy, suggesting that the speaker is in a hurry. This creates a sense of suspense and keeps the reader engaged in the story.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The author uses several elements to create a tone of suspense throughout the passage. For example, the author uses short sentences and simple words to create a sense of urgency and immediacy. The author also uses vivid imagery to help the reader visualize the scene and feel the speaker’s fear. The author’s primary purpose in using these elements is to create a sense of suspense, which can help keep the reader engaged and wanting to know what happens next.',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Craft and Structure',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Craft and Structure',
    NULL,

  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'In this paragraph, the simile "bright as the sun" is used to',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"provide a specific example of the type of figurative language that writers use.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"explain how figurative language can be used to make writing more vivid.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"illustrate how figurative language can help readers understand a person’s emotions.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"contrast the use of figurative language with the use of literal language.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'The simile "bright as the sun" is used to illustrate how figurative language can help readers visualize and understand a person’s emotions.  The simile helps the reader imagine the brightness and warmth of the person''s smile, which makes the description more vivid and engaging.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The use of figurative language, like metaphors and similes, can help to make a piece of writing more vivid and engaging.  By comparing one thing to another, writers can help readers visualize and understand their ideas in new ways.  For example, a writer might describe a person''s smile as “bright as the sun.” This simile helps the reader imagine the brightness and warmth of the person''s smile.  How does this sentence contribute to the paragraph?',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Craft and Structure',
    'medium'::difficulty,
    'SAT'::exam_type,
    true,
    false,
    false,
    'reading_writing',
    'Craft and Structure',
    NULL,
    'college_board_sat_v1',
    true,
    ARRAY['college_board','opensat','english','Craft and Structure']::text[],
    'a983e3c5',
    'college_board_opensat',

  ),
(
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'In this passage, the word "you" is used to',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"create a sense of intimacy and connection with the reader.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"describe the speaker’s feelings and experiences.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"emphasize the importance of the speaker’s message.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"suggest that the speaker is addressing a large audience.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'A',
    'The speaker is addressing the reader directly by using the word "you." This creates a sense of intimacy and connection with the reader, which can help the reader feel more engaged with the message.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The most obvious sign that the speaker is speaking directly to the reader is the use of the word "you." There are other elements of the passage that may help to make the speaker seem more immediate and personal. The speaker refers to events and places that are familiar to the reader, and the speaker uses a conversational tone throughout the passage. What is the most likely reason why the writer uses the word "you"?',

    gen_random_uuid(),
    'Which choice provides the best way to combine the sentences in the underlined portion of the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"Gibson’s vision of cyberspace was a world of interconnected computers, data, and information; it was also a world that was constantly evolving and changing.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"Gibson’s vision of cyberspace was a world of interconnected computers, data, and information, and it was also a world that was constantly evolving and changing.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"Gibson’s vision of cyberspace was a world of interconnected computers, data, and information, and it was a world that was constantly evolving and changing.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"Gibson’s vision of cyberspace was a world of interconnected computers, data, and information; it was a world that was constantly evolving and changing.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'The best way to combine the sentences is to use a comma and a coordinating conjunction to link the two independent clauses. The comma plus the coordinating conjunction "and" creates a grammatically correct and clear sentence. The other choices result in comma splices or other punctuation errors.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The following text is adapted from a blog post about the history of the internet.  

In the early days of the internet, the term "cyberspace" was used to describe the virtual world of computers and networks. The word was coined by science fiction writer William Gibson, who was inspired by the fact that the internet was a place where people could interact and communicate in ways that were not possible in the real world.  Gibson’s vision of cyberspace was a world of interconnected computers, data, and information, and it was a world that was constantly evolving and changing. Today, the term "cyberspace" is still used, but it has come to encompass a wider range of technologies and activities, including social media, mobile devices, and the internet of things.  \n',
    'passage',
    'reading_writing',
    'Standard English Conventions',

    '[{"id":"A","text":"The symphony orchestra has evolved significantly since the Baroque era.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The symphony orchestra is a major cultural institution.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The modern symphony orchestra is more complex than the Baroque orchestra.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The symphony orchestra was originally intended for the entertainment of nobles and royalty.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,

    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The following excerpt is from a historical essay about the development of the modern symphony orchestra: 

"The symphony orchestra as we know it today is a relatively recent invention. However, the modern symphony orchestra is far more complex and sophisticated than its Baroque predecessors. The modern orchestra is a vast ensemble of musicians, each playing a specialized instrument, and the repertoire of the modern orchestra is far broader and more varied than that of the Baroque era. The modern symphony orchestra has become a major cultural institution, and its music is enjoyed by millions of people around the world."',

    'Which of the following sentences is the most effective and grammatically correct?',
    'multiple_choice',
    '[{"id":"A","text":"The dog ran quickly, and he was happy.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The dog ran quickly and happily.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The dog happily and quickly ran.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The dog was happily and quickly running.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,
    'B',
    'Choice B is the most effective because it is both clear and grammatically correct. It avoids unnecessary words and phrases, and it maintains a logical order. Choice A is grammatically correct but is less effective because the inclusion of the phrase "and he was happy" is redundant, as the phrase "quickly and happily" already implies that the dog was happy. Choice C is grammatically correct, but it is awkward because it places the adverbs "happily" and "quickly" before the verb "ran," making the sentence sound less natural. Choice D is grammatically correct but is also awkward because it includes the unnecessary progressive tense, "was running." The sentence "The dog ran quickly and happily" is the most effective and grammatically correct sentence because it is clear, concise, and grammatically correct.',
    'Review the passage and eliminate choices that contradict the text.',
    'The most effective way to write a sentence is to use clear, concise language. Which of the following sentences is the most effective and grammatically correct?',
